name: run-project-bundle
description: Portable Codex plugin packaging for the public run-project skill bundle.

interface.shortDescription: Install the public run-project skill stack as one plugin.
interface.longDescription: A public-safe Codex plugin bundle containing run-project and its companion skills for project grilling, PRDs, specs, context layers, issues, writing plans, handoffs, architecture review, and acceptance checks.
defaultPrompt: Use run-project to plan this build from prompt to acceptance.
Grill this project idea, then produce a PRD and issues.
Create a handoff packet for this project.
